name: co-dialectic
description: Co-Dialectic v4.12.1 — HOTFIX for Agent tool crash: PreToolUse hook was returning updatedInput with only {model, run_in_background, prompt}, dropping description and subagent_type. updatedInput REPLACES tool_input so Agent calls crashed with `undefined is not an object (K.length)`. Fix: spread original toolInput into updatedInput before overlaying model/bg overrides.
